name: Mag Prime
description: The exquisite Mag Prime offers the same abilities as Mag but with unique mod polarities for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Nearby items gravitate toward Mag for easy collection.

abilities.name: Pull
abilities.description: Mag stuns enemies as she manifests a magnetic vortex. The vortex pulls in Polarize Shards and stunned enemies to place them directly in front of her.

abilities.name: Magnetize
abilities.description:
(TAP) Enclose a target in a magnetic field that ensnares nearby enemies and deals damage over time. The field pulls Polarize Shards that orbited Mag and shrapnel into the deadly mix.
(HOLD) Mag surrounds herself in a magnetic field that absorbs ranged attacks and reflects damage back in a destructive cone.

abilities.name: Polarize
abilities.description: Emit an energy pulse that depletes enemy shields and armor as it restores ally shields. Debris left over from the pulse becomes Polarize Shards. Nearby Polarize Shards orbit Mag and cut enemies, inflicting <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status Effect.

abilities.name: Crush
abilities.description: Magnetize the bones of nearby enemies, causing them to collapse upon themselves.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The exquisite Mag Prime offers the same abilities as Mag but with unique mod polarities for greater customization.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Mag Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Mag Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Mag Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.5

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey

The Mag Voidshell Collection is available for purchase in the in-game Market.
Fixed extreme screen shake when using the Nataruk’s charged shot and Mag’s Magnetize together.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed offset issues with the Circadian, Harkonar, Iliac, Kuva Braid, Kyroptera (default, Ormolu, Panoply), Laddak, Maggor,  Vanquished Banner (default and Day of the Dead), Quaro, Rakta, Salix (default and Solstice), Suparna, Thorac, Yomo, Amphor, Apoxys, Dessicata, Flox, Harkonar, Kuva Cloak, Mucusk, Sordario Syandanas when equipped on the Nightwave Drifter Suit.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies instantly dying when casting Mag’s Pull on enemies that are affected by Titania’s Spellbind.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.12
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag's Passive (items within 8m gravitate towards Mag) reverting to 3m when playing in a squad, both as a Host and Client. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1325296-mags-passive-works-while-solo-broken-while-host-or-client/

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed damage types from equipped weapons applying to Mag’s Shards while she is standing in a zone created by Residual Arcanes. 
Fixed script error related to Mag’s Crush.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s ‘Cold’ Elemental Ward applying a large damage multiplier bonus to bullets that hit an absorb/redirect volume (Xaku’s Whisper or Mag’s Magnetize).

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mag’s Passive vacuum radius being smaller than it originally was before Update 32. It has been restored to its former glory. 
Also fixed Mag Prime’s Passive description not being updated to its new form.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Starter Warframe Ability Changes: Excalibur, Mag, & Volt
Now creates a mini-vortex when casting, which gathers enemies in front of Mag. Polarize Shards on the ground will also be Pulled into this Vortex.
Helminth: Changed Mag’s Pull to now have diminished range when infused. Was 25m at max, now 12.5m.
Shards from Polarize are pulled into the Magnetize Bubble, including Shards orbiting Mag. 
Charged Magnetize absorb shards increase its damage by 500 for each one. Scales with Ability Strength mods. 
Shards within 3m of Mag now orbit her, inflicting the Slash or Puncture Status Effect to nearby enemies.
Increase Mag's Fracturing Crush (Augment) armor reduction from 50% to 75%, remove the 80% cap per cast and change the armor reduction to be permanent.
Removed its 100% Holster Speed bonus and reload 5% of Magazine/s when holstering Primary and Secondary weapons. 
Reduced the damage and fire rate of the Ember Specter’s Magnus secondary.
patchlogs.fixes:
This update also has a heavy focus on Quality of Life (QOL) changes including a rework to Spearguns, the three starter Warframes (Excalibur, Mag, and Volt), improvements to Riven database collecting, a whole slew of  Warframe Augment Mod buffs, and more to be discovered below.
Fixed Mag’s Polarize inconsistently removing enemy armor if it affected a group of enemies versus a single unit. 
Fixed Magus Overload’s explosion not dealing damage if the enemy affected was rising from ragdoll.
Fixed Magus Overload instantly killing robotic enemies on Void Sling. 
Magus Overload
Magus Accelerant

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error when casting Nidus’ Ravenous in the Simulacrum and then switching Warframes via Arsenal before the Maggots explode.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Magnetic Flare lasting 30 seconds across all Ranks instead of scaling with level as intended. 
Reduced the Energy drain from Magnetic procs from 50 to 20 per tick. 
This not only applies to Thrax enemies, but to Magnetic damage across the game (laser doors, magnetic water in the Plains of Eidolon, etc.)! A default Magnetic proc used to drain 250 Energy, now it will do 100. 
Fixed Thrax Legatus enemies being able to inflict Magnetic Status procs on Warframes with a Rank 5 Arcane Nullifier equipped (102% chance to resist Magnetic Status Effects entirely).
Updated the description of Magus Nourish to indicate that it heals a set amount, and does not apply healing over time.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.7
patchlogs.changes: Magnetic Flare

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Magus Vigor to +600 Health.
Increased Magus Husk to +250 Armor.
To recap, we’ve changed the math behind Enduring Tides, raised the floor on Operator survivability overall, and provided some buffs to Magus Vigor/Husk. We’ll be watching for further feedback on these changes!
Fixed Unairu’s Magnetic Flare being able to completely strip Profit-Taker’s shields in one cast.
Applied the same logic with Magnetic Flare that is used for other bosses (Eidolons and Ropalolyst for example), since completely stripping Shields in a single Magnetic Flare cast removes a large portion of certain gameplay mechanics in these fights.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.3
patchlogs.changes: The Nidus Maggot Prime script has been completed for the Tenno who purchased the Parasitic Link Pack, Ravenous Pack, and Nidus Prime Accessories Pack on PC. Your new best friend will appear in your Decorations inventory if you meet the criteria!

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
Maggot Decorations 
Void Sling out of a Magnetic Flare to refresh its duration and increase its radius by 100%.
A new Decoration has arrived and we are crawling with excitement. Nidus’ Maggot is now available in the Market as a Decoration for your Orbiter. You can adopt this adorable Infested creeper today and watch as it scuttles around. When we released Nidus Prime Access back on September 8th, 2021 we had originally hoped to include the prime versions of his Infested creepers as an additional ship Decoration.
For those Tenno who purchased the Parasitic Link Pack, Ravenous Pack, and Nidus Prime Accessories Pack on PC, we will be delivering by script the Prime version of Nidus’ Maggot. Due to how Prime Access & Prime Accessories are offered on consoles, to ensure parity those who purchased the Parasitic Link or Prime Accessories will receive 1 Prime Maggot and those who purchased the Ravenous Pack will receive 2 Prime Maggots via this script. These packs will also be updated for future purchases to include the Prime Maggot Decoration.
Fixed significant GPU performance hits when Malice uses Magnetize on a player.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Magus Destruct Arcane increasing enemy resistance to Puncture damage, not decreasing like intended.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a progression stopper in The New War Quest related to key characters being affected by Magus Anomaly.

patchlogs.name: Update 31: The New War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Disarming an enemy who is held by Xaku Gaze, Loki Radial Disarm, Baruuk Desolate Hands & Serene Storm, Naramon Disarming Blast, Mag Magnetized Discharge Augment, or Kubrow Neutralize results in them counting as a required kill for mission progress.

patchlogs.name: Prime Resurgence: Hotfix 30.9.4
patchlogs.changes: NOV 16: Mag Prime & Nova Prime

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Glaives not being affected by abilities that attract projectiles (i.e Mag’s Magnetize).
Fixed enemies appearing ghostly and losing body parts when surviving Mag’s Pull.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Hotfix 30.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Skins not applying to the Dex Furis Magazines.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes:
Magnus Prime
For a long time now we’ve had a precedent with a handful of Warframe Skins where the “None” option for Attachments (and sometimes Syandanas) was removed if certain Skins, Primes, etc were equipped. This applied to Warframes such as Ember Prime/Pyraxis Skin, Frost, Mag Prime, Oberon, Volt, etc.
We now usher in a new “None” era! All Warframes and Warframe Skins that previously did not have the ‘None’ option will have a “None” Attachment or Syandana option, giving you even MORE customization flexibility. This means you can remove details such as any attachments on Ember Pyraxis, Mag Prime, the list goes on and on! In addition, Banshee, Frost and Oberon's default Shoulder Armor can now be equipped on Prime versions of the Warframe.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed inability to Chat Link Primed Magazine Warp.
Fixed inability to Trade Primed Magazine Warp

they were only showing Magazine.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.changes: Mag’s Magnetize now has an added functionality as seen in the “Awakening” cinematic. Now, when Magnetize is held vs. tapped to cast, Mag creates and holds a Magnetize bubble in front of her that absorbs projectiles. Recast the ability to throw the absorbed damage in a cone back onto enemies. Mag can also walk while holding the bubble.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
We are making changes to Magus Lockdown due to it being virtually one of the best CC and Damage combinations in the game. In some cases you can clear waves of Elite Sanctuary Onslaught without even using a Warframe or Weapon, and simply spam Magus Lockdown to victory. This goes well beyond the intended use of it and we are changing it to a CC only Arcane 
Magus Lockdown!
Magus Lockdown will no longer apply Puncture damage to tethered enemies.
Magus Lockdown no longer affects the Golden Maw due to the Arcane killing the Maw and preventing Quest completion. 
This also fixes a script error when Magus Lockdown activates while encountering a Golden Maw.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mag’s Magnetize sometimes making enemies orbit around a central target when ‘Magnetic Pull’ was maxed with Mods.
Fixed Mag Pulling certain enemies that should not be pushed/pulled.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly reduced Mag’s Magnetize ‘Magnetic Pull’ strength to be more balanced with max level Strength Mods.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
+102% chance to resist a Magnetic Damage effect
Magus Accelerant
Magus Anomaly
Magus Cadence
Magus Cloud
We have reworked Magus Cloud, since its original design was not popular.
Magus Destruct
Magus Drive
Magus Elevate
Magus Firewall

Magus Husk
Magus Lockdown
Magus Melt
Magus Nourish
Magus Overload

Magus Replenish

Magus Vigor:
Mag: 65 to 100
Mag Prime: 65 to 125
‘Magnetic Pull’ stat has been added to address enemies that are only affected by the pull for brief moments or those that ignore it completely, as opposed to getting pulled towards the central target. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1131437-magnetize-not-pulling-in-all-enemies/

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Respective Ability videos now also appear upon hover-over to add that little extra spice! This initial Ability video aspect is currently functional for Excalibur, Mag, Volt, Garuda, Baruuk, Revenant, and Hildryn! More to gradually come!
Magus Revert now has a 3 second cooldown. This cooldown is a result of macro abuse in conjunction with Magus Lockdown and Madurai Meteoric Dash in order to deal an absurd amount of damage all at once. This change also fixes the issue:
Fixed ability to Void Dash contentiously for no Energy cost when Magus Lockdown, Magus Revert, and Madurai Meteoric Dash are triggered.

Mag Ferro Skin by Master Noob

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Mag size decreased from 60 to 40.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.13.0

Fixed primary weapon displaying wrong Magazine/Ammo pool when it is out of Ammo and is switched to from dual wielding.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Make a devastating entrance with the Maggor Assault Pack. Includes the Quartakk quad-barrelled assault rifle and hard-hitting Stubba submachinegun, with matching Maggor armor and syandana.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.3.4
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the Magus Husk from 7100 to 710 Cryotic per item.
Reduced the Magus Elevate from 2300 to 230 Oxium per craft.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nidus’ Maggots not latching onto enemies.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed leg Armor being incorrectly orientated on Mag’s Pneuma Skin.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Limbo can no longer mine while in the Rift. Rocks aren't affected by his Void Magic.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Archwing disabler projectiles not being affected by bullet attractor pulls (Mag, Amesha, etc)
Fixed Magus and Virtuos appearing as Mods when crafted in the foundry.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Unairu’s Magnetic Blast not dissipating on enemy death.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Magnetic water in the Plains affecting Limbo while in the Rift.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed not being able to install a Magus on the Operator's Zariman Suit and Hood.
Fixed Mag Pneuma Helmet being free for everyone.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Mag’s Polarize.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.additions: Breathe new life into Mag with this collection of signature items. Includes the lavish Mag Pneuma Skin, Maruta Tonfa Skin, and the Vasa Syandana.
patchlogs.changes:
Magnetic Damage Status Effects now drain energy over time as opposed to completely draining all energy. 
Changed the TennoGen Knaita Mag skin’s default colors to match the Steam Workshop’s main image. Icons for Helmet and Skin have been updated to match as well.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sancti Magistar Health on charge attack function not working with the Palatine Skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an effects-leak that could occur if Mag was killed at the right moment while casting Polarize.
Fixed offset issues with Syandanas on Mag.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.2.0 + 21.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Trick Mag applying to your Primary weapon when equipped on the Cycron.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zakti projectiles not hitting enemies in Mag’s Magnetize field.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Magnetized Discharge Augment not triggering when using the "use selected ability" key.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Changed Pyrana’s Mag to 10 in Conclave to match PvE values.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Conclave Mods that increase Mag size can no longer be used with guns that have Mags with 1-5 rounds in them.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Napalm Bombard fire projectiles not being affected by Mag's Magnetize (projectile attractors).
Fixed Magnum Force equipped on Castanas modded for multishot resulting in pin-point accuracy.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Mag’s Magnetize Discharge Augment disarm will now also have a chance to Disarm when the bubble explodes naturally.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0new Augmentsexcalibur (Exalted Blade)Mag (Magnetize)Chroma (Effigy)Volt (Electric Shield)Find These New Augments As Syndicate Offerings Today!Changes:

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Renewal no longer affects Nidus’ Maggots as to not prevent them from exploding (their intended behavior).
Pull, Magnetize, and Polarize can now be cast while in motion 
Removed the .75 second delay at the end of Mag’s Crush cast.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.5.0
patchlogs.additions: Ember Magesty Skin by Prosetisen and Cheshire

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Magnum Force Mod having 2 Accuracy stats in the description.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced Mag's Crush range in Conclave.
Removed the Impair debuff from Mag's Crush in Conclave.
Added a Range indicator effect on Mag’s Crush.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Magnetize visuals appearing larger than the actual attractor radius when applied to certain enemies (e.g. Bombards).

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Magnetize used by enemy NPC Mag’s will now have a 1 second delay before the actual ability is deployed to prevent players from instantly 1-shotting themselves when facing these enemies.
Mag's Crush range increased in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Euphona Prime Alt fire not reacting to Mag's Magnetize as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/768029-euphona-prime-alt-fire-not-affected-by-magnetize/
Fixed the Tactical Reload and Eject Magazine mods not automatically reloading on a holstered weapon after Clients use Transference from Operator to Warframe.
Fixed an issue with enemy Magnetize not functioning against Clients.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag's Sapping Reach Augment in Conclave removing Energy from teammates (should only remove from enemies).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.4
patchlogs.fixes: Mag Polarize

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Mag's Magnetize
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Mag’s Magnetize.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Noble and Agile animation stance breaking when equipping dual pistols.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag's Polarize shrapnel limit not being applied correctly (would sometimes give you one less than the intended limit).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed pick-ups sometimes falling through the ground after being moved by Vacuum or Mag’s passive or Greedy Pull ability.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when certain enemies try to teleport to Maggots attached to them.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.6.0 + 19.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the base health of Nidus’ Maggots to 1k.
To increase the visibility of Nidus' Maggots, holding down Nidus’ Virulence will now display a HUD marker on them. Keep in mind that casting Virulence on Maggots cause them to detonate!
Nidus’ Ravenous Maggots no longer auto detonate when feasting on enemies. Previously the Maggots could do a majority of the grunt work and you were able to watch the carnage and gain Stacks at the same time. Now to pop the Maggots you’ll need to cast Virulence on them and rejoice in your hard earned Stack accumulation. It’s also worth noting that with testing by our team, the Stack rhythm before and after this change wasn’t noticed at all. 
Improved the FX of Maggot explosion to better represent the intended area of explosion.
Nidus’ Ravenous Maggots will still attack but no longer latch on other Infested Maggots or Kuva Jesters due to awkward animations.  
Fixed FX, Maggots, & Health regeneration while in Ravenous staying around forever if cast by a Client who leaves.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that prevented Zenurik Magnetic Aftershock from working.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that would sometimes occur by Nidus’ Maggots exploding when latched onto an enemy.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the brightness of both Nidus’ Ravenous Maggot tails and their death FX to improve visibility.
Improved Nidus’ Maggot visibility if performance was suffering.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.2 + 19.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed infested Maggots continuing to feed off their victims even after being destroyed.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed friendly Mag Specter in The Index from damaging ally players with her Polarize ability.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.additions:
+100% Accuracy, +50% Flight Speed. -50% Magazine Capacity
100% chance of Energy Drain explosion, -60% Magazine Capacity, -60% Ammo Maximum
patchlogs.changes:
Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
Magnetic Status duration is now 6 seconds in Conclave.
Magnetic Status only removes Energy above 50% of your total in Conclave.
Magnetic Status HUD corruption FX removed in Conclave.
Increased damage of Mag’s Pull in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infested Maggots not exploding after their lifespan is up.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when Infested Maggots would attempt to attach to each other.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes:
Increased animation speed of Mag’s Crush in Conclave
Infested Maggots will now only attach to targets after a jump if they are still in range (possible for target to move out of latch range between jump animation start/end)

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 2
patchlogs.changes: Increased Kela De Thaym’s resistance to health drain to give her a fighting chance against abilities like Trinity’s Energy Vampire, Mag’s Polarize, and Inaros’ Desiccation.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes:
Mag*: 75 Platinum
Fixed an issue with Mag’s Magnetize field absorbing Oberon’s Renewal healing orbs, preventing the healing effect from reaching teammates.
Fixed an issue where a Magnetic Status Effect would typically lower the victim's Shields further upon expiry (rather than restore them properly) if it had re-triggered the Status Effect.
Fixed Mag’s Magnetize ability preventing use of Azima’s Secondary Fire.
Fixed an issue with Azima’s Secondary Fire not being affected by Magnetize’s attraction field.
Fixed unneeded resources floating where they touched Mag when she bullet jumps in the Simulacrum.
Fixed Ivara’s Navigator not deactivating when inside Mag’s Magnetize bubble.
Fixed an issue with Magnetize absorbing more damage than intended from beam weapons.
Fixed an issue with Magnetize and Cataclysm not properly interacting with Nullifer bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 7 + 7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Prime item drop values in T4 Mobile Defense and Survival. The return of Mag Prime, Dakra Prime, and Boar Prime skewed the drop tables accidentally, and for that we apologize. (One job, Sheldon) Please note that consoles will receive this fix in a near Hotfix.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 6
patchlogs.additions: Mag Prime, Boar Prime, and the Dakra Prime have been added to the Void for a limited time:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.3
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed insta-killing enemies with Mag’s Magnetize + Crush due to enemies not being able to get up.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Mag Changes & Fixes
Improved the FX of Mag’s Polarize.
Fixed Mag’s Crush FX not playing properly for Clients. 
Fixed Mag’s Magnetize bubble being invisible when inside it.
Fixed Mag dealing self-damage with Magnetize.
Lanka projectiles will now only increase the combo counter once per enemy hit when shot into Mag’s Magnetize. This also fixes firing the Lanka in Mag’s Magnetize bubble resulting in a massive unintended Sniper combo increase.
Fixed multiple Bastille’s appearing when casted by Vauban in Mag’s Polarize.
Fixed Mag’s Magnetize bubble lingering permanently when Vauban’s Vortex/Bastille is thrown inside it. This also fixes intensified FX in this situation that caused performance issues. 
Fixed overlapping text of Mags abilities in the Tutorial UI.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.1
patchlogs.changes: Temporarily removed Mag's Vacuum Passive sound until we can refine.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Mag’s Bullet Attractor targeting Corrupted Vor’s head making it difficult to defeat him due to his stomach weak spot.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.changes: •    Fixed Mag’s Pull stagger not properly being affected by stagger immunity Mods in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: A bundle for the Mag Warframe, designed by drawingyourdreams.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.changes: •    Fixed Magnetic fields spawning too close to hacking consoles, preventing the player from unlocking the Blast Door in order to extract.
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Sensor Bar doors showing near-invisible Magnetic fields.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Mag’s Pull will no longer move boss-type enemies.
Mag’s Crush will no longer lift or ragdoll boss-type enemies.
Mag’s Fracturing Crush Augment will no longer stop boss-type enemies.
Fixed the Atomos causing Mag’s Bullet Attractor bubble to turn black when hit.
Fixed the left Edo and Left Prisma Edo Shoulder Plate clipping through Mag Prime’s shoulder.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.5
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Ammo Magazine Capacity from 8 to 10.
As a result of adding 2 more shots per Magazine, reload time for a full reload has slightly increased.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Galatine, Scindo series, War, Fragor and Magistar damage increased in Conclave
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mag’s Bullet Attractor not properly drawing projectiles to hit its target.
Fixed an error causing Grineer Ramparts to ignore projectile attracting abilities such as Mag’s Bullet Attractor and Zephyr’s Turbulence as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/577331-rampart-projectiles-not-affected-by-turbulence/

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes:
Mag 
The Scindo series, Gram, Galatine, Magistar, Fragor and Jat Kittag have had their damage and Stance damage increased in Conclave.
Fixed a bug preventing Mag’s Bullet Attractor Ability from pulling in projectiles as per:  https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/568459-u18-bug-report-megathread/page-34#entry6612761

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes:
Mag, Volt and Excalibur are now purchasable through Teshin’s Conclave Offerings at the Typhoon rank.
Reduced the amount of shields Mag's Shield Polarize grants in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Maglev Mod has been removed from PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Eject Magazine / Tactical Reload / Lock and Load (Pistol/Rifle/Shotgun)

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.changes: The Martial Magnetism Mod is now called Martial Fury, and its effects now read: With a melee equipped attack speed increases 20% on hit for 3 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kubrows displaying a Magazine stat in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Bullet Attractor becoming visually frozen as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/538503-frost-iceglobe-graphical-issue/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Mag's Pull now requires an open path to affect targets -
Infested Lasers, Magnetic Clouds and Spore Clouds now ignore Kubrows and Sentinels.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Heartseeker Mod not properly interacting with the Martial Magnetism Mod.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an improper visual effect on Mag’s Shield Polarize.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Stug having no Magazine stat in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.changes: • The Magistar has been enabled for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Damage type has been changed from Magnetic to mostly Puncture.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Mag’s Greedy Pull Augment Mod will no longer pull Syndicate Medallions.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.changes:
Hydraulic Barrel/Gauge/Chamber mod Magazine Capacity penalty reduced to -10%.
Loose Chamber/Magazine/Hatch Weapon Recoil penalty reduced to 50%.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes:
Maglev
Icons in the Mag Prime and Frost Prime Bundles have been removed from the Market entirely, and will remain in the Vault for possible future release.
Magnus damage increased in PvP.
Mag's Pull damage has been reduced in PvP.
Mag's Bullet Attractor radius and lifespan has been decreased in PvP.
Mag's Crush damage has been increased in PvP.
Mag Prime base hp increased from 75 to 100.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.11: Ash Prime + Hotfix 16.11.1
patchlogs.changes: Mag’s Greedy Pull Augment will now only draw in items for Mag.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag, Boar and Dakra parts still dropping for players in the Void.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.changes: The Tainted Mag Mod has been removed from use in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Shield Polarize not properly reflecting her custom energy color when used on enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.changes: The following mods have been disabled in PvP: Magazine Warp, Slip Magazine, Burdened Magazine, Stabilizer, Steady Hands, Fast Hands, Quick Draw, Tactical Pump and Terminal Velocity. They have been replaced with PvP specific versions that have been added to the Mission Rewards of all PvP game types.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Mag's Pull damage  has been reduced in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Shield Polarize wiping any overshields you had regardless of having Mag’s Shield Transference Augment Mod or not as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/456684-has-mag-been-nerfed-or-is-it-just-a-bug/

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes:
Magnus series damage increased in PvP.
Martial Magnetism mod effects only applied with the melee weapon equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes:
Decreased the damage of Mag’s Pull in PvP.
Martial Magnetism Changes:Extra stamina cost is now applied to missed swings
Magnetism is not applied to a target if you do not have the full amount of Stamina required to attack

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.1 + 16.3.1.1 + Tactical Alert
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed emblems not sitting properly on Frost, Frost Prime and Mag Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes:
Mirage’s unique Trivelin Helmet and Limbo’s stylish Magrite Helmet will give your Warframe a new look.  Both helmets are available in the Market today!
Increased the damage of all Magnus weapons in PvP.
Increased the Energy drain of the Martial Magnetism in PvP.
Fixed the Martial Magnetism Mod not functioning properly.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased Mag’s Pull range in PvP.
Fixed projectiles affected by Mag’s Bullet Attractor not doing any damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Effects on Mag’s Bullet Attractor now match her energy color.
Fixed Mag’s Shield Transference Mod not applying the players energy color to the ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Slightly increased the damage of the AKMagnus in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the range of Mag’s Pull ability in PvP.
Increased the amount of overshield from Mag’s Shield Polarize ability in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Trinity’s Well of Life and other powers for clients targeting invulnerable enemies after Mag’s Bullet Attractor had expired.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.changes:
Mag`s Crush now ticks three times during its casting animation.  New enemies that enter within the range will be caught within Crush during each tick.
Enemies that survive Mag`s Crush will be ragdolled at the end of the animation.
patchlogs.fixes: Players will only be allowed to select Warframes from an existing list of warframes balanced exclusively for PvP 2.0.  This list will be expanded upon in future Updates and currently includes:Mag

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes:
Saryn’s Molt will now transfer enemies that ‘latch on’ to Warframes (Brood Mother Maggots, Swarm Moa Swarms, etc) instead of destroying them.
Mag Prime’s Crush now has a bit of Prime flair to its visual effect.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.12.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mag’s Greedy Pull moving weapons disarmed by the Drahk Master, making the weapon unrecoverable.
Fixed Mag’s Greedy Pull Augment not properly using its full range for other clients when relocating items.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.11
patchlogs.changes: Slightly lowered the speed in which Mag’s Pull Ability will drag enemies and items towards you.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Greedy Pull Augment not picking up items within range on client, due to host registering items as being further away.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Greedy Pull Mod picking up items at only half the range it should be as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/346046-greedy-pull-bug/

patchlogs.name: Update 15.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: 10 BATTLE POINTS: Eyes of Blight Mod Pack (Magma Chamber + Searing Steel)

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Nyx’s Mind Control causing Brood Mother Maggots to attack enemies after Mind Control ends.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Shield Transference Augment Mod not properly rotating with Mag as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/366159-shield-transferences-shield-does-not-respect-warframe-rotation/

patchlogs.name: Update 15.6.0
patchlogs.changes:
Increased Magnetic Damage from 500 to 1200
Saryn’s Molt now removes Brood Mother Maggots, Nanite Swarms, Seeker Latchers and Leeches.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.7+15.5.7.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased Magazine Size from 50 to 75

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infested Maggots latching on to invisible targets, or targets that are too far away from their leap.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.5
patchlogs.changes:
Synoid Damage: Now 210 Magnetic.
Gammacor Damage: Now 50 Magnetic
Synoid Magazine: 75
Gammacor Magazine: 50

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infested Brood Mother Maggots not detaching from Limbo once he enters the Rift.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Brood Mother Maggots stayed on players that enter Limbo’s Rift.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur’s Radial Javelin and Mag’s Shield Polarize will now check for line of sight when targeting enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag's Bullet Attractor killing player sentinels as per this thread https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/254993-bullet-attractor-kills-sentinels-last-tested-nov-3

patchlogs.name: Update 15.1.0+15.1.01
patchlogs.changes: Magistar

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Vauban's Bounce resulting in spamming "0" Magnetic Damage to enemies. Bounce will now properly deal damage to enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where weapons that had a max ammo override would not be affected by ammo max mods, like the AkZani not being affected by Trick Mag.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes:
Tweaked the Bow Idle animations on Loki, Mag, Valkyr, and Hydroid Warframes.
Improved the visuals on Mag's Pull ability.
patchlogs.fixes: Excalibur, Mag, and Volt now make up the starter Warframe options.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Mag’s Shield Polarize now indicates enemy shields explode.
Fixed an issue with Mag's Crush ability doing no damage to other players in Conclave matches.

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Mag Prime's shoulder not using the correct texture.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.additions: Added a Codex entry for Mag Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a number of projectile types ignoring Mag's Bullet Attractor power.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.changes: Visual FX tweaks to Mag’s Pull and Ember’s Fireball.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.9.2
patchlogs.changes:
Small improvements to AkMagnus: proc chance increased to 25%, crit chance increased to 25%, crit multiplier increased to 2.
Corrected AkMagnus fire/equip/reload animations and sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed damage against armored enemies with resistances (e.g. fixes Mag doing 1 point of damage to Elite Lancers)

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Grineer are now more weak to Corrosive damage and more resistant to Magnetic damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Magnum reload time tweak.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Magnetic Proc now deactivates on death or pre-death.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.5.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Grineer Rollers becoming invincible when affected by Mag's Pull ablility

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.5.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed missing Mag Prime component blueprint icons.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.5.0: The Gradivus Dilemma
patchlogs.changes:
Corrupted “Magnum Force” mod now works with Acrid.
Corrupted Mod “Magnum Force” changed from Damage/Recoil to Damage/Accuracy trade-off.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag’s Shield Polarize ability FX on enemies to use correct color.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed misaligned emblems for Mag Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.changes:
Mag: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/102829-mag-98-feedback-thread/
New death animation for Mag’s Crush ability.
Updated sounds for Mag’s abilities.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed AI affected by Mag’s Bullet Attractor ability from shooting once then stopping for several seconds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Infested Ancient Loki Switch Teleport reaction animations, Mag Crush react animations, and stealth attacks.
Mag, Nova revisions to descriptions in Marketplace. Shorter.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Mag’s Shield Polarize is now percentage-based instead of flat power (10/15/25/50)%
Various tweaks to Mag’s Pull.
Fix for size inconstancy in Mag’s Bullet Attractor.
Fix for Mag’s Pull not working as intended when client.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.changes:
Mag: Pull
Mag: Shield Polarize 
Mag: Bullet Attractor
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed enemies springing to their feet immediately after surviving Mag's Crush ability.
Fixed multiple issues with Mag Bullet Attractor ability (FX on host/client, unintended projectile weapon behaviour, Glaive was not working with this ability).

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
patchlogs.fixes:
Players using hacking terminals will not be affected by Mag's Pull power or Loki's Switch power.
Fixed Mag's Bullet Attractor hanging when cast on certain enemies.
Fixed Mag's Bullet Attractor and Trinity Link abilities having limited use against Fusion Moas, power effect now more in-line with other enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag's Crush power being locked "in use" after using destructive power on explosive nervos.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.9.0: The Glaive
patchlogs.changes: Trinity and Mag's helmet effect now works with "energy" palette color changes.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag's Shield Polarize power playing sound twice.

patchlogs.name: Update #5 is here!
patchlogs.fixes: Mag’s pull ability can rip shields away from enemies
